next_phase_on_pass: W1.7 NTS amendment for aier-canon-guard ACTIVATE
scope: Validate 4 ACTIVE skills (aier-dispatch v1.0, aier-handoff-route v1.0, aier-state-update v1.0, aier-verify v1.0) work end-to-end through 2-3 real loop runs
loop_definition: Step 1: INVOKE aier-dispatch (input: task spec; output: handoff JSON validating lane_message.schema.json)
Step 2: INVOKE aier-handoff-route (input: pull from inbox; output: routed list + ACK protocol)
Step 3: EXECUTE TASK (Lane_01 self executes per dispatch payload; commit + push)
Step 4: INVOKE aier-state-update (input: task evidence; output: regenerated state payload, idempotent)
Step 5: INVOKE aier-verify (input: report_path OR commit_evidence; output: ENDORSE/REJECT/REQUEST_CLARIFICATION)

loop_runs.scope: Update SHARED/skills/README.md with note '4 skills ACTIVE post W1.5'

loop_runs.test_focus: aier-state-update idempotency verification (run 2x same input → same output → no second write)

loop_runs.scope: Archive stale handoff messages from handoffs/inbox/Lane_01/ to handoffs/inbox/Lane_01/_archive/
loop_runs.test_focus: aier-handoff-route pull/push + ACK protocol in real workflow

evaluation_criteria.pass: All 3 loop runs end-to-end success; 24/24 schema validation PASS; aier-state-update idempotent verified; aier-handoff-route ACK protocol works; no skill HALT mid-loop; 3 verify verdicts collected
evaluation_criteria.fail: Any skill schema fail OR HALT mid-loop OR idempotency break OR loop incomplete → file fix tasks per skill

expected_deliverables: Per-run commits + final consolidated commit + backfill
